form.formComment: Resuming after a six months break. Not seen since he finished last of 7 at Newbury in the G3 Horris Hill Stakes October 25 over 1400m, soft track; 30 len behind Time To Turn carrying 58kg at $10. On debut to post a big 4 len win. Great Yarmouth September 17 over 1400m slow track defeating Tashi Delek carrying 60.5kg at $3.80. Expected to return with a bold showing.

form.formComment: Colt back from a spell of five months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation seventh of 11 at Saint-Cloud in the LR November 9 over 1400m, in the wet; 11 len behind Quiescent carrying 57kg at $10. When resuming last campaign second in a small field at Newcastle All Weather September 28 over 1200m, 2.5 len behind Augustus Gloop carrying 60.5kg at $2.40. Strong fresh performer who can play a role.

form.formComment: Resuming. Only had one start last preparation tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 2.25 len at Southwell All Weather February 7 over 1600m defeating Saint Of The Sea with 59kg at $3.50. Won previous preparation first up won by 1.0 len at Haydock Park September 4 over 1400m defeating Saniyaat's Star with 60.5kg at $9.50. Expected to make a bright return.

form.formComment: Resuming after a five months break. Not seen since winning won by 2 len Newcastle All Weather November 7 over 1400m defeating Kaindy with 60.5kg at $1.50. form.formComment: Unbeaten in two starts. Resuming. Finished off last campaign winning by 1.75 len Newcastle All Weather November 22 over 1400m defeating Reem Rak with 61kg at $3.30. form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last preparation second of 7 at this track October 11 over 1400m, 1.0 len behind Cashbox with 58kg at $4.
